title: Work-contract defaults via API, invoice PDF watermarks
content:
Here’s a summary of the most notable changes in this release.

Improvements

  • Invoice PDF templates now support text and image watermarks
  • Automatic timesheet exports can now use a configurable PDF template
  • Non-admin users can now see assignable timesheets for tasks
  • Invoice archive show if a specific user was selected in the query
  • Improved validation for new users created during timesheet imports
  • Expired login links now redirect to the login page instead of showing an error

API

  • Support for setting work-contract preferences for new users
  • Removed deprecated endpoint DELETE /api/lock/{user}/{month}

Reminders

API token authentication is scheduled for deletion, please migrate to API keys if you haven’t already.

Follow us on YouTube and LinkedIn for updates and tutorials.

title: Quality of life improvements, new API endpoints, improved Tasks management
content:
Many improvements were shipped since our last message. Here’s a summary of the most notable changes.

Improvements

  • Choose a theme for non-authenticated pages (e.g. Login, Kiosk)
  • Filter invoices by user in the invoice archive
  • Catalan translation added
  • Batch action Mark as exported for Expenses
  • Option to skip the first-time wizard for new users
  • Kiosk login page can now be accessed without login
  • Weekly hours can now be added in weeks with already exported timesheets

API

  • Manage comments for projects and customers
  • Download invoices
  • Save invoice meta-fields
  • Deprecated API passwords will be removed soon

Tasks

  • Assign timesheets to a task (matching project and activity)
  • Widgets refresh and update main timer on start, stop, unassign and delete
  • Edit timesheets with teamlead permissions if available

Importer

  • All import rows are validated before saving
  • Validation errors shown at the affected row and field
  • Customer importer supports structured addresses and more field variations
  • Fix: duplicate customer/project numbers

Videos

New video tutorials:

  • Track Expenses
  • Working Times

Follow us on YouTube to stay up to date.

title: Final notice: API passwords will be removed
content:
Important

API passwords were deprecated two years ago and are now scheduled for removal.

Please read our blog post for details: API passwords will be removed – switch to API tokens now

Improvements

  • Improved the monthly absence calendar (Reports > Absence Calendar)
    • Added support for public holidays
    • Added view_team_absence permission to allow teamleads to see absences of their team members
    • Highlight non-working days with a light gray background
  • Disallow the characters = and " in user attributes and other name fields
  • Avatar URLs must now be absolute URLs
  • Do not copy rates when restarting a timesheet record
  • Expenses: invoice queries using tags no longer return results
  • Expenses: show exporter names in the dropdown
  • SSO: ensure that RelayState redirects stay within the same cloud environment
  • API: improved Team documentation
  • API: prevent updates to disabled user preferences
  • Importer: normalize tag names
  • Kiosk: added configurable sound effects
  • Kiosk: added HTML IDs for easier custom styling
  • Updated translations

Videos

We published a new video:

  • Activate Kiosk Mode

Kiosk mode is available on annual Pro subscriptions upon request at no additional cost.

Please follow us on YouTube to stay up to date.

title: Monthly absence calendar
content:
Improvements

  • Added a monthly absence calendar under Reports > Absence Calendar
  • Fixed an issue where a month could not be approved if rejected absences existed in that period
  • Fixed the sticky calendar popup
  • Fixed the export print template when rendering user preferences
  • Fixed an incorrect calculation of timesheets with breaks in the “Weekly Hours” screen
  • Fixed missing customer permission checks in the invoice API
  • Updated translations

Videos

We added two new videos:

  • Add Users, Teams & Roles
  • Set Up Working Time & Absences

You can also watch the Foundation series for Kimai.

More videos are already in production. Please follow us on YouTube to stay updated.

Blog

  • Managing Easter Holidays
  • Kimai support emails are now handled by Mailbox.org

title: Shareable export templates, configure absence calculation, more SAML provider
content:
Highlights

  • Export templates can be used by regular users (see docs)
  • New configuration: absences/sickness/vacation/public holidays can count toward or reduce the expected working-time
  • New API endpoint: check if a date is locked
  • Support Auth0 and Authentic as SSO/SAML Provider
  • Single user reports: added column summarization per customer
  • Added styles and icons for “Working times” with special day events (like absences)

Improvements

  • Do not show report toolbars in a card, following the general Kimai UI principles
  • UI change: removed most toast messages, replacing them by a tiny loading indicator. Toasts were kept for ticktack / restarting of timesheets and error messages.
  • Use a new Strict SecurityPolicy when rendering the invoice and export PDFs

Videos

We published the last part of the Foundation series of Kimai:

  • Create Reports & Invoices - get paid for your work
  • Set Your Prices - all about rates and billable
  • Create & Edit Timesheets - timesheets, Calendar, weekly hours and more
  • Organise Your Work - an introduction to Customers, Projects and Activities
  • Get Started - first steps in using Kimai

More videos are already being recorded. Please follow us @YouTube for more updates in the future.

Bugfixes

  • The “monthly timesheet PDF” has a closing parenthesis after the personnel number
  • Mising “half public holiday and half-day absences” caused to reduce expected working time by only 75%
  • Mixing absences with and without duration on one day could mis-calculate working time, depending on creation order
  • Wrong dashboard widget labels in German
  • API doc (Team ID for new projects)
  • Cloud changelog was always shown when editing user-preferences of the currently logged-in user
  • Unreadable selected text color in dark mode
